Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health, Uzbekistan

Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health is an institution of higher learning located in Uzbekistan, which was established as a medical center of Fergana State University in 1991.

  • By Altas Mentor
  • University In Uzbekistan
  • January 25, 2025
  • Home
  • Uzbekistan
  • Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health, Uzbekistan
# Uzbekistan

Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health

Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health is an institution of higher learning located in Uzbekistan, which was established as a medical center of Fergana State University in 1991. In 1998, the institute was incorporated in the Tashkent State Second Medical Institute. The purpose of the institute is to provide the country with highly qualified doctors and public health specialists. It is a well-known center of medical education and scientific research which pays a lot of attention to practical and scientific training. Apart from that, it works together with foreign medical universities, which broadens the students’ outlook.

The facility is one of the most advanced in the region and houses 19 departments dedicated to teaching and conducting research. With the introduction of new hardware, libraries and laboratories, students are now offered improved conditions for studying. Fergana Medical Institute is a leading and internationally accredited institution of higher education in Uzbekistan and is a member of the WHO and the National Medical Council so is guaranteed the degrees will be recognized globally. In addition to these advantages, Fergana Medical Institute students have access to the campus along with its modern problems and mobile communication services. Fergana Medical Institute tries to solve every student’s problem providing them with comfortable accommodation and rest places on the campus.

Get Call Back from Atlas Mentor Counsellors

Affiliations and Recognition of Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health

Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health is an institution that has developed over time and its reputation both nationally and internationally is commendable. Certain factors like affiliations and recognitions help the institute ensure that its students are able to receive an education that is accepted around the world. Let us look at some of the affiliations and recognitions first.

Affiliation with Fergana State University Medical Centre

Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health has an affiliation with the Fergana State University Medical Centre. This strengthens the school’s academic standing as well as enables the students to make use with the available resources and facilities such as the professional and other related networks.

Recognition by the World Health Organization (WHO)

Such an institute is acknowledged by the World Health Organization. Hence, its programs are said to comply with the requirements of the international standards for medical education. WHO recognition also means that the degrees awarded by the institute are accepted all over the world guaranteeing their graduates the ability to practice medicine in numerous countries.

As Recognition by The National Medical Council (NMC) – India

The medical programs of the institute are accredited by the National Medical Council (NMC) of India. This is one of the most important factors for Indian students wishing to practice medicine in India. The NMC recognition assures that degrees obtained from Fergana Medical Institute are valid for licensure and medical practice in India.

International Collaborations and Exchange Programs

The institute has developed collaboration with a number of foreign medical institutions. Such partnerships afford students the possibility of conducting research, internship, and exchange programs to develop international approaches to medicine and healthcare service delivery.

Global Recognition and Career Opportunities

With the recognition by WHO and NMC, graduates of Fergana Medical Institute are able to practice in not only Uzbekistan but also in India and other countries where medical practice is permitted without the NMC restriction. Graduates of the institute are also qualified to state for medical practice examinations and register with the international medical community, which provides them with global employment prospects.

Emphasis on Quality and Standardization

The continous assessments of these medical institutions, after being awarded such prestigious recognition, guarantee the quality of education and medical training offered in the institution. Students from these medical institutions are likely to have a strong and accepted medical credential, as opposed the students from institutions which have not been recognized and are continuously evaluated to ensure they meet international standards for education.

This affiliation and accreditation enhance the institute’s reputation which in turn increases the appeal of the particular institution to students that wish to pursue medicine at an internationally recognized campus.

Why Choose MBBS at Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health?

At what institution address an MBBS program is perhaps the most important choice that prospective doctors have to make. Those wishing to specialize in medicine will find the Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health to be most suitable, Its features and attributes offer ample advantage. Below are key reasons why you should consider studying MBBS at Fergana Medical Institute:

Fergana Medical Institute is home to a team of highly qualified professors and researchers. With a faculty that includes specialists in various medical fields, students can expect to receive guidance from experts. The institute serves as a platform where students can carry out advanced research projects in the medical field.

This commendation permits students pursuing their career objectives across the globe, including the Indian subcontinent, wherein approval by the NMC is imperative to be able to practice.

English Medium Instruction

The MBBS program is readily available to international students as its fully taught in English. This ensures students from varying countries do not face issues due to language barriers, enabling them to concentrate on their studies.

Affordable Fees

Students from all over the world, including those from developing countries, willing to pursue their MBBS can do so because of Fergana Medical Institute’s considerably lower tuition fees than other countries. Studying abroad is usually associated with exorbitant costs and financial challenges, but Fergana Medical Institute changes that for students.

State-of-the-Art Facilities and Infrastructure

The students have modern libraries, advanced research centers, and fully equipped laboratories at their disposal. These resources enable students to do well in their studies as well as provide valuable insight and experience in actual medical practice.

Practical Training and Clinical Exposure

The Fergana Medical Institute students are provided with sufficient practical training through clinical practice at the associated hospitals. This enables and equips students with the necessary skills to effectively manage and attend to patients and medical emergencies.

Cultural and Recreational Activities

In addition to studies, the students at the institute can participate in various cultural and sporting events. Such athletic facilities like sports complexes and gyms, foster students’ physical fitness, enabling them to balance life and work while studying.

Worldwide Interaction and Collaboration:

The Institute maintains solid relationships with medical colleges around the world which allows students to participate in exchange programs and joint activities. This allows students to appreciate healthcare from different cultural viewpoints and also enhances their professional contacts.

Hygienic and Secure Living Arrangements:

Fergana Medical Institute provides students with a hostel equipped internet connection, a recreational space, and other necessary facilities alongside constant canteen services. Students have the freedom to concentrate on their academics and live in a secure environment.

Enrolling in MBBS at Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health ensures quality educational success and personal advancement in the career as the course is undertaken in a supportive and well-resourced surroundings. One of the goals for these students will be to gain recognition with a medical diploma from any country in the world, making it a perfect suited institution for those looking for fruitful medical career.

More About Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health

Below are the highlights of Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health which summarizes its features, recognition, and offerings that makes it stand out from other institutes education-wise.

Year of Establishment

Having started in 1998, the Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health has been offering medical education for over two decades now.

Type

It is a public institution, which means it is supported by the government and provides education that is certified at the national and international levels.

Eligibility

Students to get admission must score at least 50% in Physics, Chemistry and Biology taken together at higher secondary education level.

Course Duration

The Fergana Medical Institute MBBS program has a total duration of 6 years with one year of clinical training so as to provide integrated medical education and practice.

Medium of Instruction

The MBBS programe is offered in English which makes it suitable for overseas students from diverse nations.

Recognition

The institute is WHO and NMC certified which guarantees that the degrees given by the institute are recognized globally including acceptance in India for practicing medicine.

Ranking in Uzbekistan

Fergana Medical Institute is ranked 8 in Uzbekistan. This of course reflects the academic and educational standards of excellence of the country.

Global Ranking

The global ranking of the institute stands at 5013 which indicates increasing international recognition and a growing population of its foreign students.

No IELTS/TOEFL Required

The admission process is further facilitated for international students through the removal of the requirement to submit IELTS or TOEFL scores.

Affordable Tuition Fees

Affordable fees at Fergana Medical Institute are an inviting proposition for learners who wish to attain quality education without incurring major financial difficulties.

Modern Infrastructure

The institution has all the necessary facilities and infrastructures such as well equipped modern laboratories, libraries and research centers which provide for effective learning.

International Collaborations

The institute has affiliated foreign medical universities which enable students to participate in exchange programs, international studies, and foreign exposure.

Practical Training

Students are trained clinically by providing services in affiliated hospitals, thus improving their skills in practice after learning the theoretical part.

Accommodation

The hostel is the ideal form of accommodation for students because it provides up to date standards such as internet, canteens, recreation rooms and other important facilities for convenient living.

Safe Environment

The university campus is located in the center of the city and is therefore considered safe and accessible. These conditions enable students to take part in various cultural and leisure activities within the campus and in the vicinity.

Advantages of Pursuing MBBS at Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health

Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health has features that aspiring medical professionals would find useful. Some notable ones include

Foreigner Friendly

Both the World Health Organization (WHO) and National Medical Council (NMC) endorse the degree given by Fergana Medical Institute, meaning a graduate can practice medicine internationally, including India.

Skilled Teachers and Research Potential

The institute has well-educated professors and researchers who form a supportive structure for students that want to impact the field of medicine. These experts are more than willing to provide mentorship to students working on advanced medical research.

English As A Second Language

This also enables students from different nationalities to concentrate solely on studying without the hurdle of other languages.

Cost Effective Fees

Quality medical education is made available to students from different financial statuses by Fergana Medical Institute’s subsidized fee structure. This empowers students to fulfill their aspirations without the burden of debt.

Complete Curriculum and Clinical Practical Work

This academic program combines theoretical education with clinical practice. Students do extensive hands-on practice in medical hospitals which helps them in integrating their learning with real life medical practices.

Modern Equipment and Infrastructure

The institute is well endowed with modern facilities like sophisticated laboratories, libraries, and research undertakings. This ensures that students harness the newest medical equipment and other resources appropriate for their learning.

International Collaboration

Fergana Medical Institute has partnerships with the best medical universities around the world, which gives students opportunities for global exposure through exchange programs.

Safe and Comfortable Campus

The campus is situated in a secured zone. Students have access to well furnished hostel accommodation and can avail essential services at all times. Students are afforded a reasonable environment while they attend to their studies.

Strong Career Opportunities

Graduates of the Fergana Medical Institute enjoy possitive career opportunities because of the institution’s solid academic reputation, global outreach, and the realistic training that they go through during their schooling.

Cultural and Leisure Activities

The institute encourages students to focus on cultural, leisure, and athletic activities to ensure that they lead a well-rounded life, take a break from books, and socialize with other students.

These advantages identified make the Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health an exemplary institution concerning students wishing to pursue a productive career in medicine along with receiving quality education in a suitable setting.

Duration of MBBS in Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health

The duration of the MBBS program at Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health is 6 years.

The program is split into two main paragraphs

First 5 years These years focus on acquiring theoretical knowledge in Anatomy, Physiology, Biochemistry, Pharmacology, and Pathology. Basic clinical training is also done during this period.

Final year (1 year) The final year focuses on clinical training and practical exposure. Students are placed into affiliated hospitals to gain experience in patient diagnosis and treatment, working under the supervision of qualified physicians.

This division makes sure students get all the theoretical education needed alongside practical medical training, which equips them for their careers in medicine.

Fee Structure of Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health

ParticularsYear 1Year 2Year 3Year 4Year 5Year 6
Tuition Fee3500 USD3500 USD3500 USD3500 USD3500 USD3500 USD
Hostel Fee750 USD750 USD750 USD750 USD750 USD750 USD

As much as Russia is known for its sharp winters, the Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health aims to offer a hospitable environment for future medical practitioners. To serve that purpose, the fee requirements for the medical education MBBS program are set in a way that balance quality education with affordability

Tuition Fees

A basic annual fee of 3500 dollars per academic year is charged, which covers the provision of teaching, learning materials, and clinical education services.

Hostel Fees

An annual hostel charge at the rate of 750 dollars allows students to stay in well furnished hostels. This fee covers accommodation, services of utilities, and appliance of basic essential services.

Total Annual Fees

Combined Tuition and Hostel Fees results in Total Annual Fees of 4250 dollars per academic year.

Fee Payment

The required fee is remitted through bank transfers, or directly at the university’s admissions office. Payment of fees is on a conveniently flexible schedule, but the instructions set by the institution have to be adhered to for prompt processing.

Currency Fluctuations

While these fees are set at a standard equation, they are prone to change with shifts in currency exchange rates. As of now, one American dollar is equal to approximately eighty-two Indian Rupees.

Other Expenses

One should possibly note the additional expenses like medical insurance, visa charges, books and materials, as well as personal spending which contribute to the overall costs.

Affordable and Transparent

International students willing to pursue an MBBS degree will find that Fergana Medical Institute fees are reasonable and within reach as compared to numerous medical institutions worldwide.

Hostel Facilities

The hostel rooms are shared (two to three students per room) with internet access, a mess which is operational 24 hours a day, and recreational facilities for the students.

This equitable fee structure guarantees that all students, when undertaking the 6-Year MBBS program, will have access to modern education facilities without straining their financial resources.

Ranking of Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health

Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health at Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health that is ranked 8 among other medical institutions in Uzbekistan. This ranking indicates the institute’s strong standing in the academic world and its excellent healthcare training. On the global scale, the Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health is ranked 5013. Though this ranking does not put it in the forefront of global institutions, it does indicate that the institute is slowly but surely carving a niche for itself in the global medical and academic arena. These rankings indicate that Fergana Medical Institute is well positioned in Uzbekistan and is gaining exponential fame internationally for its medical programs and quality of education.

Eligibility Criteria for Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health

Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health MBBS program candidates need to fulfill the following criteria

Age Limit

The candidate needs to be above 17 years of age which is the minimum requirement. This prerequisite ensures that students are competent enough to meet the high standards of medical schooling.

Educational Requirement

The candidate must have passed twelve years of schooling (higher secondary) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology/ Health Science as subjects.

This is needed to have a minimum aggregate of 50 percent in the aforementioned subjects, which is basic prerequisite for higher medical studies.

Admission Tests

Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health does not require entrants to sit for any entrance examination to qualify for the program. Admission is done purely on the basis of academic qualifications.

NEET Requirement

The candidate needs to have completed and passed the NEET examination in India. Indian students who are looking to pursue MBBS in other countries would need to qualify NEET and this one is no exception.

Passport

A candidate applying for admission requires a passport for admission purposes and for visa processing to go study in Uzbekistan.

Medical Certificate

Also needed is medical certificate declaring that the student is fit to pursue further medical studies.

These criteria guarantee that students fully prepared on an educational level will be able to complete the MBBS program at Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health.

Admission Process for Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health

The admissions process of Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health is quite seamless and systematic. Below are the procedures to be followed.

Step 1: Document Submission

Commence by providing a scanned copy of the following documents:

Class 10th and 12th mark sheets

NEET result (if applicable)

Passport (If available)

Birth certificate

Application Form

Complete the application form offered by Fergana Medical Institute alongside the Undertaking form that is also provided by the Institute.

Payment of Initial Booking Amount

Subsequent to application submission, make the initial booking payment alongside the documents. This can be completed via online transfer or at the institute’s admission office in Fergana, M.

Admission Confirmation

Following payment, the student will receive an admission letter from Fergana Medical Institute confirming enrollment in the MBBS program and providing additional details regarding the courses offered.

Visa Application

Upon confirmation of admission, the institute will prepare all requisite documents needed for the visa application. These will be accompanied by an invitation letter to commence the process of obtaining a study visa.

With the issuance of the study visa, the applicant along with the visa will receive back all original documents which include the passport too.

Pre-Departure

A representative from Fergana Medical Institute will escort the students to the airport and ensure that everything is set for their arrival in Uzbekistan.

Completing these processes makes certain that your admission process for Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health is done effectively and easily.

Documents Required for Admission at Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health

In order to gain admission into Export, foreign applicants must know that the vising arrangements to Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health happen to be quite thorough and meticulous. The following documents need to be prepared in advance:

Birth Certificate

A child’s birth certificate proves their age and separation from the parents. For academic purposes, either a copy of an original or certified document suffices.

SSC Mark Sheet (Class 10th)

10th grade Mark sheet copy.

HSC Mark Sheet (Class 12th)

A copy of the mark sheet from the 12th Grade. Biology, Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics subjects have to be taken compulsory.

NEET Result

NEET is an acronym for the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test, which is conducted for undergraduate medical courses. Indian students who are planning to pursue their MBBS from abroad are required to qualify for NEET.

Postgraduate study medical trainees are usually granted paid vacations annually so their dates of birth need to be mentioned in the child’s certificate as they will be the governing body for any educational documentation sought by the child.

Passport Size Photograph

Dimensions of the child’s certificate have to be clearly marked in order to indicate the head and neck of the child to be portrayed within the photograph alongside their name, photograph, and their date of birth.

Tuition Fee Payment Receipt

Proof that any additional fees have been paid to the institution of further education.

Medical Certificate

Submission of a Medical Certificate which indicates that the prospective student is in good health to pursue medical studies.

These documents are prerequisite to the application form for a complete submission for the purpose of admissions.

Hostel And Accommodation At Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health

The Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health has advanced and appropriately furnished hostel facilities for its students preparing for international medical and healthcare services. A description of the accommodation as well as of the services offered is provided below.

Room Sharing:

Studenst of the Institute are allocated 2 or 3 beds in shared rooms according to their level of study. This enables the pupils to live appropriately without spending too much.

Basic Amenities:

Every room contains the following essential pieces of furniture: beds with pillows and blankets, tables and chairs. The university places learning above all and wishes for students to focus on their studies whilst living on campus, so these basic pieces are provided.

Internet Access:

All round the clock internet access is offered in every room to enable students to communicate, conduct research, and carry out other academic affiliated activities.

Mess and Canteen:

Food and drink services are offered twenty four hours through a canteen as well as a mess that is within the hostel. The meals are both requisitely healthy and inexpensive with respect to the students. The meals are prepared according to students’ ethnic and dietary specifics.

Common Kitchen:

In order to meet the culinary needs of all students, the hostel features a common kitchen where students can cook meals on their on.

Indian Food Availability:

Restaurants serving Indian cuisine are also provided in the city as the Indian students may want their traditional food.

Recreational Facilities

With respect to students’ well-being, hostels have provisions for recreational and cultural activities. In addition, the campus has gyms and other complex facilities for physical exercises and relaxation.

Safety and Security

The hostels are safe, secure, and have measures for the protection of all the students.

Location

The students are able to access all lectures and most campus activities easily without long distances because the hostel buildings are located on the campus.

The facilities aim to provide an ideal and effective balance of comfort and support during the students’ studious endeavors and lifestyle ( enjoyment).

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) about Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health

Here are some frequently asked questions by students concerning the Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health.

What qualifications are required for enrolling in Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health?

For admission, students must be at least 17 years of age and have passed their 12th grade with 50 percent and above in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology.

Is the first language of instruction at Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health English?

Yes, Fergana medical institute uses English as the medium of instruction which makes it convenient for students from abroad.

Does Fergana Medical Institute provide cheaper housing options?

Indeed, the hostel charges are very reasonable. In addition, students are provided with affordable internet, mess, recreational facilities, and comfortable living quarters at all times.

Is there any entrance exam for admission into Fergana Medical Institute?

Fergana Medical Institute does not conduct any entrance examination and all admissions are granted based on academic achievement and required documents.

Is the Fergana Medical Institute degree accepted in India?

Yes, the degree in MBBS issued by Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health is accepted by the National Medical Commission, so its holders can practice medicine in India after passing the FMGE.

This FAQ’s section clarifies the issues that almost every student grapples with prior to joining the Fergana Medical Institute of Public Health.
